// Source: https://github.com/farzahn/proffie/blob/main/ProffieOS/config/ff-jedi_survivor.h
// Fett263 OS7.14 v2.242p — Sister/Anger CustomBlade Multi-Phase 2-color (Special Abilities)
// Phase 0: Hyper Rotoscope yellow. Phase 1: StaticFire red (intense fire effect).
// EFFECT_USER1=Next Phase, USER2=Prev. ColorSelect<AltF,...> drives phase swap.
StylePtr<Layers<Black,ColorSelect<AltF,TrSelect<Ifon<Int<1>,Int<0>>,TrInstant,TrFadeX<Int<1000>>>,Mix<HoldPeakF<SwingSpeed<250>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<50>,Int<500>>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<>,Int<20000>,Int<10000>>>,RandomFlicker<StripesX<Int<15000>,Scale<HoldPeakF<SwingSpeed<200>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<50>,Int<300>>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<24000>,Int<16000>>>,Int<-3200>,Int<-200>>,Rgb<255,255,0>,Rgb<255,255,0>,Mix<Int<7710>,Black,Rgb<255,255,0>>,Rgb<255,255,0>,Mix<Int<19276>,Black,Rgb<255,255,0>>>,Rgb<255,255,0>>,Rgb<255,255,0>>,StaticFire<BrownNoiseFlicker<Rgb<255,0,0>,RandomPerLEDFlicker<Mix<Int<3213>,Black,Rgb<255,0,0>>,Mix<Int<7710>,Black,Rgb<255,0,0>>>>,Mix<Int<10280>,Black,Rgb<255,0,0>>,0,6,10,1000,2>>,TransitionEffectL<TrDoEffectAlwaysX<TrInstant,EFFECT_ALT_SOUND,ModF<Sum<AltF,Int<1>>,Int<2>>,Int<-1>>,EFFECT_USER1>,InOutTrL<TrWipeX<BendTimePowInvX<IgnitionTime<300>,Mult<IntArg<IGNITION_OPTION2_ARG,10992>,Int<98304>>>>,TrWipeInX<BendTimePowInvX<RetractionTime<0>,Mult<IntArg<RETRACTION_OPTION2_ARG,10992>,Int<98304>>>>,Black>>>()
